/tmp/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -O3 -sWASM=1 -sMODULARIZE=1 -sEXPORT_ES6=1 -sENVIRONMENT=web,worker -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 "-sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=['_malloc','_free','_jackle_prepare','_jackle_reset','_jackle_set_parameter','_jackle_get_parameter','_jackle_note_on','_jackle_note_off','_jackle_process']" "CMakeFiles/jackle-dsp.dir/wasm-bindings.cpp.o" -o jackle-dsp.js  ../libjackle_dsp.a
